DocPurchase.get.description: Retrieve many purchase documents (goods received from partners)

DocPurchase.add.description: Create a purchase document header, then add lines with Purchase Operation

DocPurchase.perform.description: Post a purchase document so it affects stock and balances

DocPurchase.performCancel.description: Unpost a purchase document, reverting its effect on stock and balances

PurchaseOperation.get.description: Retrieve the line items of purchase documents

PurchaseOperation.add.description: Add a line item to a purchase document

DocWholeSale.get.description: Retrieve many shipment documents (goods sold to partners)

DocWholeSale.perform.description: Post a shipment document so it affects stock and balances

WholeSaleOperation.add.description: Add a line item to a shipment document

DocOrderDelivery.addFull.description: Create a retail delivery order together with all of its line items in one call

DocOrderDelivery.setStatus.description: Change the fulfilment status of a retail delivery order

DocOrderDelivery.setCourier.description: Assign a courier to a retail delivery order

DocOrderDelivery.setStock.description: Assign the fulfilling warehouse to a retail delivery order

DocInventory.close.description: Close a stocktaking document and apply its differences

DocSetPrice.perform.description: Post a price-setting document so its prices take effect
